## Business Information

**Business Name:**  
*Required - Your business name as you want it to appear*

**Service Type:**  
*Required - Choose one: Plumbing, HVAC, Electrical, Carpentry, General Contracting, Roofing, Landscaping, Painting, Flooring, Handyman, Other*

**Phone Number:**  
*Required - Format: (XXX) XXX-XXXX*

**Location:**  
*Required - Choose one: Tampa, St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Brandon, Riverview, Wesley Chapel, Lakeland, Other*

**Description:**  
*Required - 2-3 sentences about your business (max 500 characters)*

**Years in Business:**  
*Optional - Number of years you've been in business*

**Website or Social Media:**  
*Optional - Your website, Facebook, Instagram, or LinkedIn*

**Email:**  
*Optional - For verification purposes only (not displayed publicly)*

## Verification

By submitting this form, you confirm:
- [ ] You are authorized to represent this business
- [ ] The information provided is accurate
- [ ] You serve the Tampa Bay area
- [ ] You have appropriate licenses/insurance for your trade

## Premium Badge Interest

**Interested in Premium Badge?**  
*Optional - $49 one-time fee (not monthly!)*
- [ ] Yes, I'm interested in the premium badge
- [ ] No, just the free listing

Premium badge includes:
- ✅ "Verified" checkmark badge
- ✅ Featured placement (top of directory)
- ✅ Priority in search results
- ✅ Contact info displayed prominently
- ✅ Business highlighted in listings

## Notes

*Any additional information or questions:*

---

## What Happens Next

1. **Verification:** We'll verify your business (usually within 24 hours)
2. **Listing:** Your business will be added to the directory
3. **Premium:** If interested, we'll contact you about premium badge payment
4. **Confirmation:** You'll receive a confirmation when listed

**Directory URL:** https://raiderj77.github.io/tampa-contractors/

## Contact

Questions? Reply to this issue or email [will be added later]

*Thank you for listing with Tampa Contractors Directory!*
